The '''''Pincer''''' was a [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] that was part of [[Task Force Vengeance|Task Force ''Vengeance'']] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. She was part of the group of reinforcements that were pulled out of [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[Modified Strike Cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Strike-class)|Peregrine]] and was [[Ambush in the Derilyn system|destroyed]] along with the rest of the group by the Rebels.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
